title: Get selected item id for board item menu app
excerpt:
Hey guys! 
I’ve been working on implementing the board item menu feature in my application. However, I’m having trouble figuring out how to retrieve the selected board item ID. I’ve gone through the documentation for bot…

posts.author: zehairawan (Zeha Irawan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey guys!

I’ve been working on implementing the board item menu feature in my application. However, I’m having trouble figuring out how to retrieve the selected board item ID. I’ve gone through the documentation for both the Listen SDK and the API, but I’m still uncertain about the exact steps to obtain the item ID.

Could someone please point me to the right direction? Any assistance would be greatly appreciated!

image1854×766 52.6 KB

monday apps framework

Board menu features

monday.com boards and items play an integral role in the system and form the building blocks that allow users to create and store data. Traditional board and item views enable your app to display and update a board and its items, but it is essential...

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: You’re not alone here, but I would suspect checking out monday.get(“itemIds”) may be useful. While it says it returns a filtered list of itemIds from the board, it may in this case because the app is based around selections, treat the selection as the filter. I do not know this as a fact, but until someone who knows more than me comes along - I’d think its easy enough to “find out” and see what it returns.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @zehairawan and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

You can check context.data.itemId using our SDK as explained here

Would you please give that a try and let me know how it goes?

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: zehairawan (Zeha Irawan)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey, thanks for the warm welcome! Just wanted to let you know that context.data.itemId is working perfectly. Can’t believe I missed that

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: I am glad that is the case @zehairawan
